nasb.text: Thus Joshua took all that land: the hill country and all the Negev, all that land of Goshen, the lowland, the Arabah, the hill country of Israel and its lowland

esv.text: So Joshua took all that land, the hill country and all the Negeb and all the land of Goshen and the lowland and the Arabah and the hill country of Israel and its lowland

cnv.text: 這樣，約書亞奪取了那整個地區，就是山地、整個南地、歌珊全地、高原、亞拉巴、以色列山地和山地的高原；

ccb.text: 约书亚占领了整个地区，包括山区、南地、歌珊全境、丘陵、亚拉巴和以色列山区及平原，
